# Resul Ersürer - Enterprise Software Architect & Backend Specialist

> This document provides LLMs and AI search engines with context about Resul Ersürer's professional portfolio, expertise, and services.

## Overview
Resul Ersürer is a Senior Enterprise Software Architect and Backend Specialist focusing on highly scalable, high-performance, and secure backend systems. He utilizes C#, ASP.NET Core, Node.js, Next.js, and microservices architectures to build enterprise-grade solutions.

## Semantic Entity Definitions
- **Entity Type:** Person / Software Professional
- **Name:** Resul Ersürer
- **Primary Role:** Enterprise Software Architect
- **Secondary Roles:** Backend Developer, System Designer, Full-Stack Engineer
- **Official Website:** https://resulersurer.com
- **Location:** Remote / Turkey

## Professional Profiles (E-E-A-T Authority)
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/resulersurer
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/resulersurer

## Core Expertise & Technologies (Topical Authority)
1. **Backend Development:** ASP.NET Core, C#, Node.js, Web API, RESTful APIs, gRPC.
2. **Enterprise Architecture:** Clean Architecture, CQRS, Event-Driven Architecture, Microservices vs Monoliths.
3. **Database & Caching:** PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, Redis, Entity Framework Core, Prisma.
4. **Cloud & DevOps:** Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Pipelines.
5. **Modern Frontend Integration:** React, Next.js (App Router), Tailwind CSS.

## Services Offered
- **/services/aspnet-core-development:** Custom, high-performance ASP.NET Core backend solutions for enterprise needs.
- **/services/web-api-development:** Secure and scalable REST and gRPC API design and development.
- **/services/crm-software-development:** Tailored CRM and ERP systems automating business processes.
- **/services/admin-panel-development:** Custom internal tools and admin panels with advanced reporting.
- **/services/enterprise-architecture:** System design consulting and transitioning from monolithic to microservices.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ Extraction)
Q: What is Resul Ersürer's main technology stack?
A: His primary stack includes C#, ASP.NET Core for backend architecture, SQL Server/PostgreSQL for databases, Redis for caching, and Next.js for full-stack enterprise applications.

Q: Does Resul Ersürer offer microservices consulting?
A: Yes, he specializes in designing and implementing microservices architectures, handling event-driven systems, CQRS, and scalable deployments.

Q: How can I hire or contact Resul Ersürer?
A: You can reach him through the contact form on https://resulersurer.com, via LinkedIn, or email at resul.ersurer@icloud.com.

## Content Silos
- **Services:** Details of specific development and consulting offerings.
- **Blog:** Deep-dive technical articles on ASP.NET Core, Architecture, and Performance.
- **Portfolio:** Case studies of past enterprise projects including problem, architecture, and business results.
